login.title: O Amogetswe Gape
login.subtitle: Tsena go laola polasi ya gago
login.error: Go tsena ga go atlega. Tlhatlhoba tshedimosetso ya gago.

register.title: Itlhaolela Akhaonto
register.subtitle: Ikwadise mo Farm-Aid gompieno
register.receiveUpdates: Ke batla go amogela dikitsiso ka malwetse le ditlhwatlhwa tsa mmaraka
register.alreadyHaveAccount: A o setse o na le akhaonto?
register.error: Go ikwadisa ga go atlega. Leka gape.

logout.confirm: A o tlhomamisa gore o batla go tswa?

forgotPassword.title: Lebetse Khunolamaru
forgotPassword.subtitle: Tsena nomoro ya gago ya mogala go amogela khoutu ya netefatso
forgotPassword.codeSent: Khoutu ya netefatso e rometswe kwa {phone}
forgotPassword.enterCode: Tsena khoutu ya dinomoro tse thataro
forgotPassword.error: Go tlhola khunolamaru ga go atlega

resetPassword.title: Tlhola Khunolamaru
resetPassword.subtitle: Tsena khunolamaru ya gago e ntsha
resetPassword.redirect: O tla kwalolwa go tsena mo metsotsong e meraro
resetPassword.error: Kgokagano e e sa atlegeng kgotsa e fedile

biometric.title: Tsena ka Biometric
biometric.instructions: Dirisa monwana kgotsa sefatlhego sa gago
biometric.notSupported: Biometric authentication ga e tshegetsiwe mo sedirisweng se
biometric.securityNote: Datha ya gago ya biometric ga e tloge mo sedirisweng sa gago

offline.title: Tsena kwa Ntle ga Inthanete
offline.instructions: Ga o a golagana le inthanete. Dirisa tshedimosetso ya gago ya kwa ntle ga inthanete.
offline.id: ID ya kwa Ntle ga Inthanete
offline.idHelper: E batla mo tshedimosetsong ya gago ya kwa ntle ga inthanete
offline.note: Go tsena kwa ntle ga inthanete go dira fela fa o setse o letleletswe go dirisa kwa ntle ga inthanete.

errors.phoneRequired: Nomoro ya mogala e a tlhokega
errors.phoneInvalid: Nomoro ya mogala ga e a siama
errors.emailInvalid: Aterese ya imeile ga e a siama
errors.passwordLength: Khunolamaru e tshwanetse go nna le ditlhaka tse di ka nnang 6
errors.nameRequired: Leina ka botlalo le a tlhokega
errors.locationRequired: Lefelo la polasi le a tlhokega
errors.licenseRequired: Nomoro ya laesense e a tlhokega
errors.termsRequired: O tshwanetse go dumela le melawana
errors.invalidOTP: Khoutu ya netefatso ga e a siama
errors.uuidRequired: ID ya kwa ntle ga inthanete e a tlhokega
errors.pinRequired: PIN ya dinomoro tse nne e a tlhokega
errors.sessionExpired: Nako ya gago e fedile. Tsena gape.

2fa.title: Netefatso ya Dikgato Tse Pedi
2fa.description: Tsenya tshireletso e e oketsegileng mo akhaontong ya gago
2fa.scanQR: Sekena khoutu e ya QR ka sesebediswa sa gago sa authenticator
2fa.enterCode: Tsena khoutu ya dinomoro tse thataro
2fa.backupHelp: Dirisa dikhoutu tse fa o latlhegelwa ke sesebediswa sa gago sa authenticator
2fa.enabled: Netefatso ya dikgato tse pedi e dirilwe
2fa.disabled: Netefatso ya dikgato tse pedi e emisitswe
2fa.error: Khoutu ya netefatso ga e a siama

sessions.title: Dithuto tse di Dirang
sessions.logoutAll: Tswa mo Dithutong Tse Dingwe Tsotlhe
sessions.confirmLogout: A o batla go tswa mo sedirisweng se?
sessions.confirmLogoutAll: A o batla go tswa mo didirisweng tse dingwe tsotlhe?
